instructions: Get T-number (task number) from .todo/config file before adding new tasks. Assign a T-number to each new task in TODO-next, keep one task per bullet, move completed tasks to TODO-done, use a Links section for related references, and keep TODO metadata inside .todo.
suggestions: Keep TODO-next focused on important developer and end-user work.
Use shared config under data-config/frontend_shared.json and data-config/server.json for the date/alias rule source.
Document relative date calculation rules and deterministic overwriteToday behaviour.
